title: strychnos ternata
intro: Strychnos ternata, also known as the Natal poison nut, is a plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Strychnos ternata is often prepared in herbal form through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
